title: Cobblemon Poképedia: Cobblepedia
description: An in-game Poképedia wiki book for Cobblemon using Patchouli.
body:
# ‼️ Archived ‼️

Cobblepedia will not receive any further major updates.

I discontinued this project in order to focus on developing [**Cobblemon Knowlogy mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy), a newer mod which also adds the wiki info into a book in the game and has been updated regularly to be up to date with Cobblemon.

# Cobblepedia

An in-game Poképedia wiki book item for [Cobblemon](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon/) using [Patchouli](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Patchouli/) that shows information from the [official cobblemon wiki](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Main_Page) and tracks advancements added by Cobblemon.

## Features:

- Custom UI textures that fits with Cobblemon's aesthetics ([see gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblepedia/gallery))
- Advancements
- Crafting Recipes
- Basic Tutorial

## How to get the Poképedia:

- Received by completing the "Choosing a Starter Pokémon" advancement;
- Crafted with a book and any apricorn;
- In creative mode (Found on the Tools and Utilities creative tab);
- or With the command: `/give @s patchouli:guide_book{"patchouli:book": "cobblepedia:cobblepedia"}` for mc1.20.1 or `/give @p patchouli:guide_book[patchouli:book="cobblepedia:cobblepedia"]` for mc1.21.1.


<details>
<summary>Mod Requirements</summary>

### *Patchouli* 

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) 
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli)[![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-fabric)

Has the functionality to add the Poképedia to the game.

### *Cobblemon*

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) 
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)

Adds the content explained by the book. 

</details>

<details>
<summary>Recommendations</summary>

### *Cobblemon Interface* Resourcepack
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface) 
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cobblemon-interface)

Changes the minecraft interface to fit better with cobblemon's UI.

### *PatchouliButton* Mod

[![Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchoulibutton) 
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchoulibutton)

Adds a button to the inventory that lists the Poképedia.
You can change it's config to go directly to the cobblemon book (useful to modpack makers).

</details>

## Localization

The mod has translation files for the following languages:

- **Brazilian Portuguese** (pt_br), by me;
- **Chinese** (zh_cn), by `@x1759603258` on Gitlab;
- **Italian** (it_it), by `@mik_profilo_di` on Discord;
- **Spanish** (es_es), by `@lavinytuttini` on Discord;

*Obs: Some of these translations are outdated and/or incomplete.*

## Other:
Texture based on [Torrezx-Improved Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torrezx-improved-library) resourcepack books and inspired by the books in [Legends of Arceus trailer](https://youtu.be/SbIA8FKhwl0) intro books
